headline: Fullstack developer building practical web products from Sukabumi.
subhead: I build web apps, dashboards, APIs, internal tools, and practical IT support systems for teams that need clear execution.
intro: I work across frontend, backend, and operational workflows. My focus is turning unclear technical or business problems into tools that are easy to use, maintain, and improve.
I am currently available for internships, freelance projects, and collaboration with teams that need a developer who can understand both the product surface and the technical foundation.
philosophy: Good software should make real work easier. I care about interfaces that are clear, backend flows that are predictable, and small details that reduce confusion for users.
I like working close to the problem: understanding what the team needs, what data matters, what workflow is repeated, and what technical support is needed after the first version ships.
I value pragmatic implementation. The best solution is usually the one that is reliable, understandable, and ready to be improved without making future work harder.
beyond: Outside of implementation work, I enjoy learning how real teams operate: where data gets stuck, where people repeat manual steps, and where better tooling can help.
That interest is why my portfolio includes web development, dashboards, backend work, and practical IT support instead of treating them as separate worlds.
